nasb.text: “Woe to him who builds his house without righteousness And his upper rooms without justice, Who uses his neighbor’s services without pay And does not give him his wages,

esv.text: “Woe to him who builds his house by unrighteousness, and his upper rooms by injustice, who makes his neighbor serve him for nothing and does not give him his wages,

cnv.text: “用不義的手段建造自己房屋、 用不公正的方法建築自己樓房的， 有禍了！ 他使自己的同胞白白作工， 不把工資付給他們。

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “约西亚的儿子犹大王约雅敬啊，你有祸了！ 你以不公不义的手段建造宫廷殿宇， 不给工人发工钱。
